architecture_summary: Bind Personal Assistant approval review packets to closed dry-run and foundation closure evidence using digest-only source_closure_refs, while keeping the review packet preview-only and non-authoritative.
data_model_changes: Add source_closure_refs to the approval review packet contract.
Add metadata flags for digest-verified source closure binding and payload non-serialization.
Update the approval review fixture with dry-run and foundation closure packet source refs, schema refs, packet IDs, closure fields, and SHA-256 digests.
Update runtime ApprovalPlanProposal review projection to emit the same digest-only source closure references.
migration_plan: No persisted migration is required; this changes a checked-in preview schema, fixture, validator, runtime projection, and tests only.
rollback_plan: Revert the source_closure_refs schema requirement, fixture fields, validator checks, runtime projection additions, and tests; approval review packets return to abstract proof URI binding only.
validator_changes: Validate required source_closure_refs for dry_run_packet and foundation_closure_packet.
Validate source refs and schema refs stay under repository root.
Validate newline-stable SHA-256 digests match checked-in source files.
Validate source packet IDs, solver outcomes, and closure fields match the referenced packets.
Reject source payload serialization drift and missing digest-only source binding metadata.
